programs.title: Assault on Precinct 13
programs.desc: A cop must arm prisoners to help fend off an attack by gunmen who want to kill a gangster.

programs.title: The Jackal
programs.desc: IRA operative (Richard Gere) helps FBI find canny political assassin (Bruce Willis).

programs.title: The Story of Us
programs.desc: A married couple (Bruce Willis, Michelle Pfeiffer) try to rekindle the flame.

programs.title: October Sky
programs.desc: A West Virginia miner's son (Jake Gyllenhaal) becomes a NASA scientist.

programs.title: One True Thing
programs.desc: A career woman (Renée Zellweger) grudgingly cares for her dying mother (Meryl Streep).

programs.title: About a Boy
programs.desc: An irresponsible playboy bonds with a woman's 12-year-old son.
